survey.title: The State of AEO Adoption Among US SMBs
survey.description: Original research surveying 300+ US small-to-medium businesses on AI-search adoption, barriers, and investment plans.

questions.en: What industry is your business in?
questions.es: ¿En qué industria se encuentra tu negocio?
questions.rationale: Maps to the 14 NWM niches. Used to segment findings and show which industries are AEO-ready.
Defines SMB segment. Enables analysis of how AEO adoption correlates with company size.

questions.en: Have you ever asked ChatGPT, Claude, or Perplexity a question about a service or product you wanted to buy?
questions.es: ¿Has preguntado a ChatGPT, Claude o Perplexity sobre un servicio o producto que querías comprar?
questions.headline_potential: X% of SMB decision-makers use AI search for buying decisions
questions.rationale: Core behavior metric. Shows the addressable market for AEO and establishes baseline AI-search usage among SMB owners.

questions.en: In the last 90 days, how often has a customer mentioned finding you via AI search?
questions.es: En los últimos 90 días, ¿cuántas veces un cliente ha mencionado haberte encontrado a través de búsqueda de IA?
questions.headline_potential: Only X% of SMBs report consistent AI-source customer discovery
questions.rationale: Measures the actual revenue impact of AI search today. Reveals the gap between usage and customer attribution.

questions.en: Have you optimized your website specifically for AI engines (AEO)?
questions.es: ¿Has optimizado tu sitio web específicamente para motores de IA (AEO)?
questions.headline_potential: Only X% of SMBs have implemented AEO; X% don't know what it is
questions.rationale: Primary adoption metric. Shows the awareness gap and stage of implementation across the market.

questions.en: What % of your marketing budget goes to AEO/AI-search optimization?
questions.es: ¿Qué % de tu presupuesto de marketing se destina a AEO/optimización de búsqueda de IA?
questions.headline_potential: X% of SMBs allocate 0% of budget to AEO despite using AI for purchasing
questions.rationale: Shows disconnect between awareness and investment. Highlights the market opportunity.

questions.en: Which AI engines do you think your customers use most?
questions.es: ¿Cuáles crees que son los motores de IA que más usan tus clientes?
questions.rationale: Identifies which platforms SMBs prioritize. Segments recommendations by engine awareness.

questions.en: Do you have FAQ schema or structured data on your site?
questions.es: ¿Tienes esquema FAQ o datos estructurados en tu sitio?
questions.headline_potential: Only X% of SMB websites have FAQ schema, despite it being critical for AEO
questions.rationale: Technical readiness metric. Shows the infrastructure gap preventing citations.

questions.en: Are you cited by any AI engine when someone asks about your category?
questions.es: ¿Eres citado por algún motor de IA cuando alguien pregunta sobre tu categoría?
questions.headline_potential: X% of SMBs are not being cited by AI engines despite online presence
questions.rationale: Outcome metric. Measures the primary AEO goal and shows visibility gap in AI results.

questions.en: What's your biggest barrier to AI-search optimization?
questions.es: ¿Cuál es tu mayor barrera para la optimización de búsqueda de IA?
questions.headline_potential: X% of SMBs cite [barrier] as their top reason for not implementing AEO
questions.rationale: Reveals market blockers. Segments SMBs by decision factor (price-sensitive vs. skeptical vs. knowledge-gap).

questions.en: What would you pay for a service that gets you cited by AI engines?
questions.es: ¿Cuánto pagarías por un servicio que te ayude a ser citado por motores de IA?
questions.headline_potential: X% of SMBs would pay $1K+/month for AEO services; X% wouldn't invest
questions.rationale: Pricing sensitivity and willingness-to-pay. Most marketable finding—shows addressable market size at different price tiers.

questions.en: Have you noticed a measurable change in lead quality since AI search rose?
questions.es: ¿Has notado un cambio medible en la calidad de los clientes desde que la búsqueda de IA se popularizó?
questions.headline_potential: X% of SMBs report improved lead quality from AI-sourced customers
questions.rationale: Measures lead quality, not just volume. Shows ROI potential and differentiates AI search from other channels.

questions.en: Do you measure AI-citation rate as a marketing KPI?
questions.es: ¿Mides la tasa de citas de IA como un KPI de marketing?
questions.headline_potential: X% of SMBs measure AI citations; X% don't track it at all
questions.rationale: Maturity metric. Shows how many SMBs treat AEO as strategic vs. tactical vs. ignored.

questions.en: Can we contact you for a follow-up case study?
questions.es: ¿Podemos contactarte para un estudio de caso de seguimiento?
questions.rationale: Identifies candidates for detailed case studies and testimonials. Supports future content.
Enables report delivery and follow-up outreach.

expected_findings.headline: AI search adoption exceeds AEO implementation by 3x
expected_findings.description: While X% of SMBs use ChatGPT/Claude for buying decisions, only X% have optimized for AEO.

expected_findings.headline: X% of SMBs would pay $1K+/month for AI citations
expected_findings.description: Despite knowledge gaps, price-insensitive segment shows strong willingness to invest in AEO services.

expected_findings.headline: Only X% of SMBs are currently cited by AI engines
expected_findings.description: The citation-readiness gap is stark: most SMBs lack schema, FAQ structure, and entity-graph completeness.

expected_findings.headline: [Barrier] is the #1 reason SMBs aren't implementing AEO
expected_findings.description: Segmentation by barrier type enables targeted messaging.
expected_findings.impact: Messaging clarity for sales and marketing

expected_findings.headline: AI-sourced leads show X% improvement in quality vs. traditional search
expected_findings.description: First quantitative evidence of lead-quality ROI from AI search.
